children.text: any tributary river or stream to the Columbia River not designated in subsections (c) or (d) of this section or otherwise specified in this subsection which flows in whole or in part through a special management area, unless the construction of a water resources project would not have a direct and adverse effect on the scenic, cultural, recreation, and natural resources of the scenic area;1So in original. Probably should be “subsection”.1

any river or river segment which flows in whole or in part through the scenic area and which is established pursuant to State law as a wild, scenic, or recreation river or which is under study pursuant to State law for the potential inclusion in any such State protected river system, unless such project or projects meet terms and conditions set by State agencies exercising administration over such river or river segment;

children.label: A
children.text: final approval of the Gifford Pinchot National Forest Plan, adopted pursuant to the National Forest Management Act of 1976 (Act of , , as amended) ( et seq.); orOctober 22, 1976Public Law 94–58816 U.S.C. 1600

children.label: B
children.text: submittal by the Secretary of a report to the President on the suitability or nonsuitability for addition to the national wild and scenic rivers system and a report by the President to the Congress of recommendations and proposals with respect to the designation of such river under the Wild and Scenic Rivers Act [ et seq.];16 U.S.C. 1271
the Hood River, Oregon, if such facility impounds or diverts water other than by means of a dam or diversion existing as of ; andNovember 17, 1986

the segment of the Little White Salmon, Washington, from the Willard National Fish Hatchery to its confluence with the Columbia River if such facility impounds or diverts water other than by means of a dam or diversion existing as of .November 17, 1986

children.heading: Exceptions
children.label: b Exceptions
children.text: The provisions of subsection (a) shall not apply to those portions of tributary rivers or streams to the Columbia River which flow through or border on Indian reservations. Nothing in this section shall apply to or affect any segment of any river designated as a wild and scenic river under section 3 of the Wild and Scenic Rivers Act () or any river designated for study under section 5 of such Act ().16 U.S.C. 127416 U.S.C. 1276
